commit_carrying_tool_message_mismatch_ca: tool/anima_law64_conway_train_volume_sweep.hexa + state/law64_train_volume_sweep/*.log were absorbed by concurrent cron commit c55fd840 (an11-fire SSH fix) — file content correct, commit message belongs to a different stream. This verdict.json is the canonical T8i-train-volume witness with proper message anchor.

raw_12_pre_registration.criterion: |Δadvantage_per_thousand[k] - advantage_per_thousand[k-1]| < 5 across two consecutive ticks → CONVERGED at the smaller N_TRAIN
raw_12_pre_registration.fallback_if_never_met: DIVERGENT (parallel to F3 Stouffer z, commit 7b51ee67)

hypothesis_letters.A: PLATEAU at non-zero advantage (Markov ceiling exposed)
hypothesis_letters.C: CONVERGES-DOWN — Markov approaches CA on simple periodic patterns

setup.test_set_window: trailing 15 pairs after step max_train (identical for all ticks)
setup.execution_environment: Mac local CPU (raw 42 caveat — short Conway sim, ~5s wallclock)

verdict.label: CONVERGED_TO_PARITY
verdict.hypothesis_supported: C — Markov order-1 catches up to CA(5) at 10x10/32% as N_TRAIN grows; advantage drops 63 → 10 → 0

implication_for_law_64.interpretation: CA(5) advantage at 10x10/32% is a TRAIN-VOLUME ARTIFACT. Under-trained Markov (n≤50) loses 1-6%; fully-trained Markov (n≥150) reaches PARITY because the 10x10/32% trajectory enters a short periodic orbit that order-1 bigram fully memorizes. The +22% advantage on 40x40/80x80 (commit 95b43ddb) is therefore conditional on EITHER (i) larger state space outside Markov's bigram coverage at any N_TRAIN, OR (ii) longer/aperiodic orbit. Train-volume is NOT a symmetric scaling axis with grid/density — it COLLAPSES advantage on small grids while grid/density EXPAND it.
four_axes_of_law_64_v3: train-volume (CONVERGED-TO-PARITY at N_TRAIN=500 on 10x10/32%, this verdict)

raw_91_caveats.C1_execution: Mac local CPU per raw 42 — no GPU/witness ledger; total wallclock ~5s for 5 ticks
raw_91_caveats.C2_test_set: Held-out test fixed at trailing 15 of 1515-step trajectory — comparable across all N_TRAIN ticks
raw_91_caveats.C3_periodic_orbit: Conway is deterministic; 10x10/32% likely enters short cycle; long N_TRAIN visits identical pairs (no new info beyond cycle period). This EXPLAINS parity convergence; does NOT generalize to aperiodic chaos.
raw_91_caveats.C4_markov_capacity: Order-1 per-cell bigram has fixed 4-count capacity → saturation mathematically guaranteed; this experiment measured WHEN (n≈150-500), not IF
raw_91_caveats.C5_forward_track: Predicted forward step — repeat at 40x40/32% to test whether parity also achieved on larger orbit; predicted NO (advantage persists on larger state space)

raws_compliance.raw_12_frozen_pre_registration: PASS — declared in tool comment header before --run
raws_compliance.raw_42_local_execution_caveat: DOCUMENTED — Mac CPU acceptable for axis sweep
raws_compliance.raw_91_honesty: PASS — verdict reports CONVERGED_TO_PARITY honestly; explicitly disclosed periodic-orbit explanation rather than claiming universal Markov saturation
